# JIRA_CONFIG.md
# Project-layer file -- Jira field mappings for this project
# Generated by: npx aec init (fill in the values for your project)
# Read by: all agents that create or update Jira issues
#
# IMPORTANT: Fill in every field before running any /draft-epics or
# /draft-stories command. Agents read this file first so they never
# have to discover field IDs at runtime -- saving time and tokens.
#
# How to find field IDs for your project:
#   In Copilot Chat: "Using jira-mcp, search fields for project [KEY]"
#   Or ask your Jira admin for the custom field IDs.

---

## Jira project configuration

```
Project key:        SPOCKT
Project name:       SPOCK T
Jira base URL:      https://jira.atlassian.teliacompany.net
Board type:         Scrum
Default issue type: Story
```

---

## Custom field mappings

These are the exact field IDs and accepted values for this Jira project.
Agents use these values directly -- no discovery needed.

```
Development Team field:
  Field ID:         customfield_12725
  Type:             Single select (option)
  Value for demos:  SPOCK Common
  All valid values:
    - None
    - SPOCK Samurai
    - SPOCK Athena
    - SPOCK Product Mgmt
    - SPOCK Common
    - SPOCK DevOps

Sprint field:
  Field ID:         customfield_10020
  Type:             Sprint
  Note:             Leave blank on creation -- set during sprint planning

Story points field:
  Field ID:         customfield_10016
  Type:             Number
  Note:             Set during refinement -- leave blank on creation

Epic link field:
  Field ID:         customfield_10014
  Type:             Epic link
  Note:             Set when creating stories under an epic

Labels for AI-generated content:
  ai-engineering-commons       -- all issues created by the commons framework
  ai-generated-spec            -- issues with AI-generated spec linked
  ai-generated-code            -- issues where code was AI-generated
  ai-reviewed                  -- issues where PR was AI-reviewed
```

---

## Default values for issue creation

Agents use these defaults unless overridden by the command:

```
Development Team:   SPOCK Common
Reporter:           [set automatically from API token owner]
Assignee:           Unassigned (set manually during sprint planning)
Priority:           Medium
Labels:             ["ai-engineering-commons"]
Components:         None (set manually if needed)
```

---

## Issue type IDs

```
Story:       Use "Story" (string -- Jira resolves the ID)
Epic:        Use "Epic"
Bug:         Use "Bug"
Task:        Use "Task"
Sub-task:    Use "Sub-task"
```

---

## Workflow statuses

```
To Do          -- default on creation
In Progress    -- engineer picks up the story
In Review      -- PR opened, awaiting review
Done           -- AC validated, merged to main
```

---

## Version and review

| File owner | Tech Lead |
| Review cadence | When Jira project configuration changes |
| Last updated | 2026-04 |
